title: Gig&Co
description: Gig&Co is a workforce marketplace platform designed to bridge businesses and gig workers. It enables organizations to recruit, manage, and pay temporary staff through a centralized digital platform, while providing workers with flexible job opportunities and a seamless work experience.

title: Thailand Election 2569
description: A real-time election results platform built for Daily News (เดลินิวส์) covering Thailand's 2026 general election and national referendum. As results streamed in on election night, it reported live vote counts by candidate, party, and constituency on an interactive WebGL map of Thailand — with a Scala backend aggregating a continuous results feed and pushing sub-second updates to a React front end that stayed fast and stable under a massive nationwide traffic spike.

title: Project Three
description: A creative experiment or side project. Great place to show personality and range.
